subject: LSJ Trip
body:
Jeffrey

Since Pres Trump didn't come to PBI Yet,
For you departure to LSJ on Dec 26th,, should Darren and Dave pick you up in PBI? Or do you prefer Boca for departure, at this time no TSA issue in PBI,,

Let me know if you prefer PBI or Boca for departure Wed Dec 26th?

Thx
Larry

Sent from my iPhone
